name: Basecamp 2 Tent
description: Lightweight two-person backpacking tent with a weatherproof rainfly.

name: Ridgeback 4 Tent
description: Roomy four-person car camping tent with a full-coverage vestibule.

name: Summit 45L Backpack
description: 45-liter internal-frame pack sized for weekend trips.

name: Alpine 65L Backpack
description: Expedition pack with a load-transferring hipbelt for multi-day hauls.

name: Ridgeline Hiking Boots
description: Waterproof mid-cut boots with aggressive grip for rocky terrain.

name: Approach Trail Runners
description: Breathable low-profile trail runners with a rock plate underfoot.

name: Summit Down Jacket
description: 800-fill down jacket that packs into its own chest pocket.

name: Dry Ridge Rain Shell
description: Three-layer waterproof shell with pit zips and a helmet-ready hood.

name: Nomad 20° Sleeping Bag
description: Mummy-style down bag rated to 20°F, packs down small.

name: Trailfire Camp Stove
description: Compact canister stove that boils a liter of water in under four minutes.

name: Kettle Camp Cook Set
description: Nesting anodized pot, pan, and kettle set for two hungry hikers.

name: Canyon 32oz Water Bottle
description: Insulated stainless bottle that keeps water cold all day.
